channel.title: DTO
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from DTO, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: DOJ watchdog investigating handling of Jeffrey Epstein files
item.description: Congress passed the Jeffrey Epstein files law in November after then-Attorney General Pam Bondi reneged on a promise to release the DOJ's investigator...

item.title: U.S. stocks close lower as tech sells off and investors focus on Iran tensions
Trump's lack of focus on economy is spooking Republicans as 2026 election looms
item.description: President Donald Trump has been posting a lot on social media about his White House ballroom, the Iran war, and Pope Leo XIV. Not much about rising ga...

item.title: Kevin Warsh hearing takeaways: Trump Fed chair nominee defends finances, says president never demanded rate cuts
item.description: Fed chair nominee Kevin Warsh's confirmation hearing before the Senate Banking Committee will bring questions about interest rates and his personal we...

item.title: Intel earnings: Chip maker's stock rockets as guidance impresses Wall Street
ServiceNowâs stock sinks, taking the software sector down with it
Investors are worried over private credit. Why is money flowing into these ETFs?
White House warns of 'industrial-scale' efforts in China to rip off U.S. AI tech
item.description: The U.S. government has previously accused China of targeting American AI technology and intellectual property.

item.title: Stocks off session lows in final hour, but tech-heavy Nasdaq leads declines
Trump orders Navy to 'shoot and kill any boat' laying mines in Hormuz Strait
item.description: Trump's post shows the U.S. ratcheting up tensions with Iran over the strait, which has been largely choked off to oil tanker traffic since the war be...
